step_rationale: Plaque autoantigen and erosion biomarker; associates with cap degradation.
mechanism: ALDH4A1 autoimmunity marks atherosclerotic plaque instability and fibrous-cap erosion.

references.title: Atherosclerotic Autoantigen ALDH4A1 as a Novel Immunological Indicator for Plaque Erosion in Patients with ST Segment Elevated Myocardial Infarction.
ALDH4A1 is an atherosclerosis auto-antigen targeted by protective antibodies.
